allow: Bash(git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/syedfahimdev/nanogents.git && git pull origin main 2>&1)
Bash(git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/main main 2>&1 && git remote add upstream https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot.git 2>&1 && git fetch upstream 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import ast, sys
with open\('scripts/wizard.py'\) as f:
    try:
        ast.parse\(f.read\(\)\)
        print\('wizard.py: syntax OK'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'wizard.py: SYNTAX ERROR: {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
")
Bash(git checkout -- nanobot_logo.png nanobot_arch.png 2>/dev/null; git status --short)

Bash(bash -e -c '
count=0
# no iterations — count stays 0
echo "Templates synced \($count new files\)"
echo "no crash with count=0"
')
